_metadata.name: KEV Reachability Validation Brief
_metadata.description: Authorized CVE research workflow that discovers exposed services, runs Nuclei CVE templates, cross-references CISA KEV, enriches with NVD metadata, and writes a reachability validation brief for known-exploited CVEs on target.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: KEV Reachability Validation Brief
manifest.description: Validate which CISA KEV CVEs are reachable on authorized targets via bounded port scan, httpx, and Nuclei CVE templates.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: KEV Reachability Validation Brief
graph.description: Prove KEV-listed CVE reachability on authorized targets using Nuclei and public KEV/NVD metadata.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorized targets
runtimeInputs.description: Hosts, IPs, CIDRs, or domains authorized for bounded CVE reachability validation.

runtimeInputs.description: Scope notes and rate limits for the engagement.
